description: Primary model used to classify claim urgency, summarize claim notes, and draft adjuster next steps.
MCP tools provide policy, customer profile, and claim history context to the copilot.
Reasoning model used to synthesize variance explanations and forecast narrative summaries.
Warehouse query MCP server retrieves governed finance metrics and budget variance slices.
Screening review model summarizes candidate packets and produces recruiter review notes.
Primary support response model drafts customer answers from approved knowledge context.
Embedding model powers retrieval over support knowledge articles before response generation.
Slack workflow MCP server routes approved answer drafts and escalation notices to support channels.
Security ticket MCP server flags support cases that require incident handling or access review.
Code repository MCP server retrieves release notes and defect references for technical support answers.
Approved support answer drafts are reused by the claims copilot when claim escalations require customer communication.
